results.title: Blue Sox knock off Rangers
results.description: INWOOD - Friday night’s game had an ugly beginning for the home team Martinsburg Blue Sox.

results.title: College baseball: Schaffner and UNC baseball inch closer to MCWS championship series
results.description: Janesville’s Jake Schaffner and his University of North Carolina teammates are one victory away from advancing to the best-2-of-3 NCAA Division 1 baseball championship series.

results.title: Chicago Bulls reportedly hiring Tiago Splitter as new head coach
results.description: Splitter went 42-39 as the interim head coach with the Trail Blazers this season.

results.description: Splitter went 42-39 as the interim head coach with the Trail Blazers this season.

results.title: When is the Knicks' NBA championship parade? Date, route and what to know
results.description: After 53-year title drought "this city never stopped believing in the Knicks," mayor Zohran Mamdani said. Fans will get to celebrate in full June 18.

results.title: 240 athletes participate in Dimapur District Taekwondo C’ship
results.description: Dimapur, June 15 (MExN): A total of 240 players participated in the Dimapur District Taekwondo Championship organised by the Dimapur District Taekwondo Association (DDTA) at the Multi-Disciplinary Sports Complex near DC Court Junction.The championship witnessed participation from taekwondo athletes across various age groups and weight categories, with competitors vying for top honours and qualification to the state-level tournament.According to the organisers, gold medallists from the district championship have been selected to represent Dimapur at the 36th Nagaland State Taekwondo Championship, scheduled to be held from July 28 to 30 at IG Stadium, Kohima.

results.title: 2027 NFL Draft: Summer scouting rankings for defensive linemen
results.description: The defensive line group in the 2027 NFL Draft could be a stacked one based on what we saw in Summer scouting.

results.description: It's a perilous time to for the O's staff to face anyone, let alone go to Seattle and face the Dodgers with a highly-suspect rotation
